title: Hard Kill
description: Lance DeLorca is Rico Cruz. With his partner, Booker Dane, he squares off with the ruthless drug lord, El Jéfe.
quote: You need backup, just say the word.
alt1: Cruz and El Jéfe talking in a desert town
alt2: Booker Dane with a sniper rifle
alt3: above shot of the face off
alt4: El Jéfe and a woman henchman who has a red-haired woman at knifepoint
